Petition For 1. Appointment Of Deborah Y. Lee, Clpf, Ncg Successor Trustee 2. Change Of Venue 3. For Payment Of Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Nov-07-2022 Continued To Dec-21-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Michael Freedman, via Zoom, for and with Alan Chan, Petitioner; Michelle Brunson and A.J. Bastida, via Zoom, for and with Kelby Chan, Respondent; Deb Fox, via Zoom, for and with Deborah Lee, proposed Trustee.

Mr. Freedman reports of the delay in appointing a Trustee in this matter and offers advocacy for the appointment of Deborah Lee as Trustee. The court confirms that Mr. Freedman objects to the appointment of Kelby Lee as Trustee. Mr. Bastida reports that two professional fiduciaries have agreed to serve and that a majority of the twelve beneficiaries have agreed to appoint one and that he advised Mr. Freedman of the preceding but has not received a reply. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the appointment of a Trustee. Mr. Bastida confirms that he is not certain as to the exact number of beneficiaries who have consented to the appointment of a professional fiduciary and that he will work on that issue and will work on obtaining consents from the fiduciaries. The court queries counsel regarding the prospects of mediation. Mr. Freedman reports that the parties appear to be at an impasse thus making mediation futile but that the appointment of a Trustee may help the parties resolve this matter. Mr. Freedman also advises of his position that a court order will be required to resolve this matter. The court indicates that it is inclined to continue this matter to allow Mr. Bastida to file a competing petition. The court instructs the parties to meet and confer regarding the appointment of a professional fiduciary.

The matter is continued to Dec-21-2022 at 9:00 am. Mr. Bastida is instructed to include the preceding date on his petition and to state that Judge Moody has approved the special setting.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Court Reporter: Noelia Espinola. CSR: 8060. T: 408.375.4454. E: noelia1127@gmail.com.

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances; Michael Freedman appeared by zoom for Alan Chan (Petitioner).
Paul Perdue appeared by zoom for and with Kelby Chan (Trustee) by zoom.

The parties requested a 60-day continuance to do private mediation. The Petition for Suspension of Powers and Removal of Trustee, etc. is continued to October 18, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. A joint report on status of mediation is to be filed on or before October 12, 2021.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
